Bloque: Hero

We are Velour®
Bloque: Features

Packed with thousands of features

From Image generation to video generation, Everything AI has APIs for literally everything. It can even create this website copy for you.

Track issues effectively

Track and manage your project issues with ease using our intuitive interface.

Capture pictures with AI

Capture stunning photos effortlessly using our advanced AI technology.

Watch our AI on YouTube

Whether its you or Tyler Durden, you can get to know about our product on YouTube

Deploy in seconds

With our blazing fast, state of the art, cutting edge, we are so back cloud servies (read AWS) - you can deploy your model in seconds.

M

Mike

hace 2 minutos

¡Envíalo ya! Acabo de dejarte un Tip de $50 💸 Sabes que nunca te digo que no. Hablamos más tarde ❤️

Cerramos ventas en tus DMs mientras tú descansas.

Learn more

Ingresos Predecibles

Despierta cada mañana viendo cómo tu cuenta bancaria ha crecido.

Learn more

Blindaje de Privacidad

Geobloqueo estricto y eliminación de contenido filtrado (DMCA) 24/7.

Learn more

Audiencia Global

Atraemos a los fans que más pagan a nivel mundial.
Bloque: About Intro

Somos Velour® la agencia de representación exclusiva que lleva tu carrera al 1% de los creadores..

Bloque: Case Studies

Top global: modelo validado con cifras reales.

El mercado premium demuestra tracción constante. Enfocamos la cuenta a oferta exclusiva y conversión por intención, no por volumen.

Nextdock

Reposicionamiento: marca personal con propuesta clara.

Redefinimos narrativa, tono y pricing para elevar percepción de valor y reducir fricción en la compra.

Nextdock

Sistema de DMs: cierres diarios con guiones de venta.

Implementamos playbooks de conversación, segmentación por intención y follow-ups para escalar tickets altos.

Nextdock

Operación 24/7: chatters + automatizaciones controladas.

Combinamos equipo humano y flujos automatizados para mantener respuesta rápida sin perder personalización.

Nextdock

Resultado: ingresos previsibles y comunidad más leal.

La cuenta pasó de ingresos irregulares a crecimiento estable con mayor retención y mejor LTV por suscriptor.

Nextdock

OnlyFans en España: la ventana de oportunidad ya está abierta.

Con celebrities y nuevos perfiles compitiendo, la diferencia está en ejecutar mejor, no en publicar más.

Atracción de fans Tier 1 con estrategia internacional.

Optimizamos contenido, horarios y embudo de entrada para captar audiencias con mayor capacidad de gasto.

Pricing inteligente: menos ruido, más margen.

Ajustamos packs, PPV y upsells para mejorar rentabilidad por conversación y aumentar el ingreso medio.

Gestión de reputación y privacidad en tiempo real.

Aplicamos protocolos de protección de marca, geobloqueo y respuesta inmediata ante incidencias.

Escalado sostenible sin depender de picos virales.

Con métricas claras y operación diaria, el crecimiento pasa a ser un sistema repetible y controlado.

From concept to market: how we built a timeless brand identity.

Working closely with a mission-driven company from their earliest stages, we created an identity that reflects their values of sustainability and innovation. The new brand helped them establish credibility.

Bloque: Logos
Bloque: Services
Logo Design
We create logos that are simple, memorable, and versatile. Each design is crafted to reflect your brand's values and connect with your audience.
Brand Identity
A logo is just the beginning. We build complete brand identity systems — including colors, typography, and style guides — so your brand looks consistent everywhere.
Rebranding
Is your current logo outdated? We help businesses refresh their look with a modern identity that stays true to their story while appealing to today's audience.
Icon Design
We design custom icons and visual marks that work alongside your logo, making your brand easier to recognize across digital platforms, print, and everyday applications.
Bloque: Process (Values)

Our Values

Clarity

Design that communicates instantly.

Simplicity

Logos that are memorable and versatile.

Quality

Every detail refined.
Bloque: Services Section

Services

At Hive, we focus on building strong visual identities that make brands instantly recognizable. From the first sketch to a full identity system, we design logos and brand assets that are simple, memorable, and built to last.

View

Brand Identity

Complete identity systems including color palettes, typography, and usage rules to ensure consistency everywhere your brand appears.

Identity SystemsColor PalettesStyle Guides
View

Icon Design

Tailored icons and supporting marks that strengthen recognition and add flexibility to your brand system.

Custom IconsApp Symbols
View

Logo Design

Custom logos, wordmarks, and symbols designed to reflect your brand's story and values with clarity and impact.

Logo MarksWordmarksTypographySymbols
View

Rebranding

Modernizing outdated logos and refreshing visual identities so brands can stay relevant without losing their essence.

Brand RefreshStrategyModernizationGrowth

Bloque: Service What You Get

What you get

Logo system

Primary, secondary, and alternate logo variations for different uses.

Color palette

A complete color system with primary, secondary, and accent colors.

Typography guide

Carefully selected fonts and type hierarchy for all your communications.

Bloque: Service Featured Work

Featured work

Nextdock

Neobase

Charter

Bloque: Our Process

Our process

Discovery

We start by understanding your business, audience, and goals. This foundation ensures every design decision connects to your story.

Research & Strategy

We explore your industry, competitors, and trends to define a creative direction that sets your brand apart.

Concept Design

Our team creates multiple design directions — from logos to icon systems — each shaped to fit your needs and brand personality.

Refinement

We collaborate with you to refine the chosen concept, polishing details like color, typography, and balance until it's perfect.

Delivery

You receive all final assets — logos, icons, guidelines, or identity kits — packaged in professional formats ready for web, print, and beyond.

Bloque: Testimonials

Testimonials

Hive gave us a logo that feels bold and confident. It's simple, memorable, and works perfectly across all our platforms

Robert Evans

Founder of BankPro

Hive took our rough ideas and turned them into a clean, timeless logo. The process was smooth, and the result is something we're proud to put everywhere.

Anna Peterson

Founder of Nextdock

The team really listened to our story and captured it perfectly in the design. Our new identity feels professional and has already impressed our clients

David Kim

Director at Scalar

We needed a rebrand that felt fresh but stayed true to our roots. Hive delivered exactly that — modern, simple, and versatile

Sofia Martinez

Marketing Lead at Neobase

Professional, fast, and creative. The new logo has already made a difference in how our customers see our brand

James Carter
